prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约2531名、3222名、3021名、2979名、11069名。2021–2024年位次在2500–3200名区间窄幅波动，2025年因青海省首次实 施新高考（物理类/历史类），考试模式和计分方式变化导致位次体系重构，物理类最低位次骤降至约11069名，较2024年下降约8090名；该校在青海省理科/物 理类招生计划：2021年27人、2022年27人、2023年29人、2024年28人、2025年32人（物理类）、2026年32人（物理类）。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影 响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第54名，近年排名稳步上升（2021年第55→2022年第55→2023年第54→2024年第52 →2025年第48→2026年第54），整体处于全国中上水平，在211高校中位居前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区周边监测 到不明巨型生物活动，学校启动一级响应停课），可能对考生报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第98，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常记录中未见武 汉理工大学相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A，交通运输工程、机械工程获评A-，材料科学为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的材料类、 交通运输类、机械类等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，武汉理工大学在上述 领域均有招生且实力较强；本省2026年考生总数约48000人，按2025年物理类占比约63.9%估算，2026年物理类考生约30670人，较2025年物理类30457人略有增加，竞 争小幅加剧；武汉理工大学位于湖北省武汉市，属中部地区，对青海考生而言 属于跨省就读；该校在青海省招生占比极小（2025年物理类32人，占该校全国总招生比例极低），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅重构 的基数效应、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生略有增加、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年11069名基础上略有回升（竞争略加剧），预测最低 位次约10869名，区间10369–11369名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 2531, 3222, 3021, 2979, and 11069 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 2500–3200 range. In 2025, due to Qinghai Province implementing the new college entrance examination for the first time (physics category/history category), changes in exam mode and scoring methods led to a restructuring of the ranking system, causing the minimum ranking for the physics category to drop sharply to about 11069, a decrease of approximately 8090 compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province for science/physics category: 27 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 32 (physics category) in 2025, and 32 (physics category) in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 54th, with rankings steadily rising in recent years (55th in 2021 → 55th in 2022 → 54th in 2023 → 52nd in 2024 → 48th in 2025 → 54th in 2026), overall at the upper-middle level nationwide and among the forefront of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity detected around the Nanhu campus, triggering a Level 1 response and class suspension), which may have a certain negative impact on candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. No signs of admission cutoff anomalies related to Wuhan University of Technology have been found in historical records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, Transportation Engineering and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-, with Materials Science being the university's flagship discipline, directly corresponding to the Materials, Transportation, and Mechanical categories in enrollment majors, providing some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society. Wuhan University of Technology has strong offerings in these fields and recruits students in them. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 48,000. Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of approximately 63.9%, it is estimated that there will be about 30,670 physics category candidates in 2026, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, in the central region, which means cross-province enrollment for Qinghai candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (32 physics category students in 2025, accounting for a very low proportion of the university's total national enrollment), so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking restructuring in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the number of physics category candidates in the province, and the somewhat negative school reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly recover from the 2025 level of 11069 (due to slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10869, with a range of 10369–11369.

If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice. Tier 1 majors (Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, Automation Category) can be considered as reach options, while Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering Category, Environmental Category, Chemical Category) serve as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<10369), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>11369), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 784, 1163, 706, 2570, and 1044 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 700 and 1200 from 2021 to 2023, dropped significantly to 2570 in 2024, and rebounded to 1044 in 2025 (new Gaokao history category), showing overall large fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Qinghai Province: 3 students in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 3 in 2025 (history category), and 5 in 2026 (history category). The 2026 plan expands by 2 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 66.7%), a significant expansion that helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 54th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs but leveraging the overall platform advantages of the university. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents, which may have a certain negative impact on the application psychology of liberal arts candidates. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, rated as average. The liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) at Wuhan University of Technology correspond to discipline evaluations where Law, Business Administration, and Foreign Languages and Literature have not individually reached A- or above, indicating relatively limited support from advantageous liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity rating of recommended (relatively hot), suitable for civil service and other system employment directions. Business Administration has a social popularity rating of divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 48,000. Based on the 2025 history category proportion of about 36.1%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 17,330, roughly the same as the 17,212 history category candidates in 2025. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, which means cross-province study for Qinghai liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai's liberal arts is very small, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant expansion of the 2026 history category enrollment plan (+66.7%), the basically unchanged number of candidates in the province, and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the 2026 history category will shift backward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 ranking of 1044. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1512, with a range of 1240 to 1784.
